name: Evolve
description: Use after completing complex tasks to extract reusable patterns, or when reviewing past work for learnings. Triggers on /evolve, 'what did we learn', 'extract patterns', or automatically via cron every 2 hours. Also fires when skill effectiveness tracking or salience decay is needed.

onboarding.title: Evolve — Pattern Learning
onboarding.summary: Automatically reviews completed work every 2 hours and extracts reusable patterns. Applies salience decay to old memories.
onboarding.why_it_matters: Your AI gets smarter over time. Without this, it never learns from past work.

auto_detect.description: Automatically detect skill-worthy patterns after task completion

retirement_days.description: Days of inactivity before suggesting skill retirement

cron_enabled.description: Enable automatic TODO processing every 2 hours

max_todo_timeout.description: Max seconds Claude gets per TODO item
